ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "ship_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping mode used for the order */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the order was placed */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items ordered */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit from the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the order */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last modified */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_ship_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_mode_id") REFERENCES ship_modes ("ship_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer segment */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "postal_code" INTEGER /* Postal code of the customer's location */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last modified */,
  "loyalty_member" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is a loyalty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_modes" (
  "ship_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping mode */,
  "ship_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping mode */,
  "estimated_delivery_days" INTEGER /* Estimated number of days for delivery */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the shipping mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sub-category */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "sales_price" REAL /* Sales price of the product */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Inventory level at which a reorder should be placed */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to be reordered */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last stock update */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "sales_price" REAL /* Sales price of the product in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost price of each unit in the order item */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit for each order item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the supplier is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  "postal_code" INTEGER /* Postal code of the supplier's location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier record was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
